title: The Literary Agent’s Invisible Hand: Laura B. McGrath on Middlemen
description: “Good taste means nothing if you can’t sell a book.”
hook: A literary agent reveals how taste becomes irrelevant without the hustle to move books—power lives in the middleman, not the work.

title: The Christophers review – a brilliant showcase for Ian McKellen and Michaela Coel
description: This brisk 'emotional heist' from director Steven Soderbergh and writer Ed Solomon develops into a rich exploration of art, identity, authorship, and the value of artistic legacy.
hook: Soderbergh and McKellen team up on art theft as philosophy: who owns a creation once it enters the world?

title: Exclusive Cover Reveal of “Distortion” by Kathryn Bromwich
description:
Electric Literature is pleased to reveal the cover of Distortion by Kathryn Bromwich, which will be published on March 9, 2027 by Two Dollar Radio. You can pre-order your copy here. A knife-sharp, deliciously sexy story about a young actress and the lengths she will go to fulfill her dream, under the guidance of a […]

The post Exclusive Cover Reveal of “Distortion” by Kathryn Bromwi
hook: A young actress will do anything—anything—to make it. This is the sharp, sexy story of ambition without guardrails.

title: My Neighbor’s Stalking Consumed Me
description:
To a Bird Watcher by Faith Palermo While I sit at my desk to write, you shine a laser pointer through my window. With a fluid motion of your hands, I become segmented. Concentrated green light outlines my chest, my throat, my eyes. I feel the slice, skin turning cold, distanced. You act, and I […]

The post My Neighbor’s Stalking Consumed Me appeared first on El
hook: Your neighbor weaponizes a laser pointer through your window. A poet turns violation into fragmented, brilliant meditation.

title: A Whole New World
description: Disneyland taught Americans how to embrace the technologies that undergird our lives.
hook: Disneyland didn't just entertain America—it taught us to love the surveillance systems hiding in plain sight.
